title: rubus abieticollinus
intro: Rubus abieticollinus, also known as the Mountain Raspberry, is a species of bramble or raspberry that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus abieticollinus include its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus abieticollinus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
